name: Gaito
description: The leader of the sea monsters who is bent on taking over the marine world. He is always depicted drinking wine, and wearing black. His resemblance to Kaito made the latter a subject of initial ire by Rina. He is known in the anime as Gaito (ガイト). There is no official reason for the name change, but one obvious reason is to distinguish him from the J-Pop star Gackt, whose name is spelt the same way in katakana.

name: Giselle Perdium
description: Born into the noble Perdium family, Ghislain Perdium harbored a deep resentment toward his household. Consumed by feelings of inferiority, he lashed out in defiance, pushing away those around him. As his reckless behavior worsened, the once proud Perdium estate grew distant, and isolation became his only companion. description: Goofy is one of Sora's teammates, and the Captain of the Royal Guard at Disney Castle. He is voiced by Bill Farmer in English and Yu Shimaka in Japanese.

name: Himari Takanashi
description: Hikari's twin sister, who is an ordinary human. She is much more serious than her sister, both as a person and a student. She often tries to make her sister act more mature, but is unable to. Despite their constant bickering, they care about each other and have many similarities such as similar tastes in food and fashion. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Hishi Amazon
description: A hot-blooded racer who loves nothing more than a one-on-one fight. Though seen by most as a fierce competitor, she has the good grace to congratulate her opponents should they win. She is the rather hot-tempered leader of Miho Dormitory, and is proficient at cooking, cleaning, and laundry. Although generally reliable in just about any situation, you probably shouldn't mention the notion of ghosts or thunder around her. name: Houjou
description: Houjou is a student who shares the same class as [Takagi](https://anilist.co/character/120800/Takagi) and [Nishikata](https://anilist.co/character/120799/Nishikata). She has a mature personality which contrasts with her classmates. Every time she sees someone immature, she would say how immature of them. Despite her maturity, she is often endeared by [Hamaguchi](https://anilist.co/character/163023/Hamaguchi)'s clumsy personality.

name: Kanata Shinozaki
description: Kanata is Haruka's younger sister by one year, who adopts a cat-like behavior pattern and is seldom seen without her cat-ear hoodie jacket. She is very infatuated with her older brother and considers herself the only girl cute enough to be his girlfriend. One of her favorite interactions with him is to have him pet her on the head.

name: Karin Yuuki
description: Number 4 of UQ Holder's immortal squad, Numbers. She is very devoted to Yukihime after having been saved by her in the past and is jealous of Touta's close relationship with her. Her immortality is said to come from divine origin, as all her wounds heal instantly instead of just regenerating fast like in most immortals. Because of it she was branded as a witch and hunted when she was a small child centuries ago. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kidou
description: Kidou is an exterminator that lives in Trade City E-05 in Soutwest Asia on the borders of the Extreme East. His profession forces him to live a life of danger, and he is extremely efficient at killing Cagasters.

name: Kiyoh Bachika
